meta.description: Generates a 9:16 vertical video (Instagram Reel + YouTube Short) for any approved content_queue post. Pipeline: ElevenLabs TTS voiceover → DALL-E 3 slide images (one per carousel slide) → Shotstack MP4 assembly → save URL back to Supabase → notify via email.
meta.cost_estimate: ~$0.29 per video (DALL-E 3: 5×$0.04=$0.20 + ElevenLabs Starter ~$0.04 + Shotstack $0.09). Monthly for 20 videos: ~$10.80 total.
meta.trigger: POST /generate-video  body: { post_id: '<uuid>' }. Call from your approval dashboard after approving a post, OR wire as a sub-call at the end of Flow 02's approval path.

nodes.name: Webhook: Trigger Video Generation
nodes.notes:
POST { post_id: '<uuid>' } to start video generation.
Can be called manually from dashboard or auto-triggered at the end of Flow 02's approval path.

options.responseBody: {"status":"queued","message":"Video generation started. Takes ~4-6 min. Check content_queue.youtube_video_url when done."}

nodes.name: Respond to Webhook
nodes.notes: Immediately ACKs the caller. The rest of the flow runs async.

nodes.name: Supabase: Fetch Post Data
nodes.notes: Loads youtube_script (spoken content), carousel_slides (5 slide texts), and image_prompt (visual style) from content_queue.

nodes.name: Has YouTube Script?
nodes.notes:
True  → generate video
False → skip (post was drafted without a script — run Flow 01 first)

nodes.name: Skip: No Script Found
nodes.notes: This post has no youtube_script. Re-run content generation (Flow 01) first, then re-approve.

nodes.name: Code: Parse Script + Extract Slides
nodes.notes:
Strips timing labels from the HOOK/POINT1/CTA format to produce clean spoken text for TTS.
Also validates that carousel_slides array exists (needed for per-slide images).

nodes.name: ElevenLabs: Generate TTS Voiceover
nodes.notes:
Generates MP3 voiceover from the script text.

SETUP:
  ELEVENLABS_API_KEY  — elevenlabs.io → Profile → API Keys
  ELEVENLABS_VOICE_ID — elevenlabs.io → Voice Library → pick a voice → copy ID
                        Recommended: 'EXAVITQu4vr4xnSDxMaL' (Bella, clear professional female)
                        or 'VR6AewLTigWG4xSOukaG' (Arnold, authoritative male)

  Free tier: 10,000 chars/mo (~10 videos/mo)
  Starter: $5/mo for 30,000 chars (~30 videos/mo)

Output: binary MP3 stored in $binary.data

nodes.name: Supabase Storage: Upload Audio
nodes.notes:
Uploads the ElevenLabs MP3 to Supabase Storage bucket 'content-audio/shorts/'.

SETUP REQUIRED:
  1. Supabase Dashboard → Storage → New bucket → Name: 'content-audio' → toggle PUBLIC ON
  2. Shotstack (and DALL-E) need to fetch these URLs, so public access is required.

x-upsert: true overwrites if the same post is regenerated.

nodes.name: Code: Build Slide Image Items
nodes.notes:
Emits one item per carousel slide. Each item contains:
  • slide_index  — position in video (0-4)
  • slide_text   — text to display on screen
  • image_prompt — DALL-E 3 prompt (base style + slide-specific copy)
  • audio_url    — Supabase public URL for the full-length voiceover
  • total_slides — used to calculate per-slide duration

nodes.name: Process Slides Loop
nodes.notes:
Processes one slide at a time.
Output 0 → DALL-E 3 (current slide)
Output 1 → Code: Assemble Shotstack Timeline (all slides done)

nodes.name: DALL-E 3: Generate Slide Image
nodes.notes:
Generates a 1024×1792 (9:16) image for this slide using DALL-E 3.

SETUP:
  OPENAI_API_KEY — platform.openai.com → API Keys

Cost: $0.04 per image · 5 slides × $0.04 = $0.20 per video

The returned URL is valid for 1 hour — Shotstack downloads it during render
so no need to re-host the images.

nodes.name: Code: Extract Image URL
nodes.notes:
Extracts the DALL-E 3 hosted image URL and merges it with the slide metadata.
Carries slide_index forward so images are sorted into correct order when collected.

nodes.name: Code: Assemble Shotstack Timeline
nodes.notes:
Collects ALL 5 slide images, sorts by slide_index, then builds the Shotstack timeline JSON:
  • 1080×1920 @ 30fps (Reels/Shorts spec)
  • Track 0 — full-bleed DALL-E images with Ken Burns zoomIn + fade transitions
  • Track 1 — bold white HTML text overlay per slide (bottom-third, dark scrim bg)
  • Track 2 — SNG Advisors teal branding pill (top-left, always visible)
  • Soundtrack — ElevenLabs MP3 with fadeOut

No Shotstack template required — fully dynamic inline definition.

nodes.name: Shotstack: Start Render
nodes.notes:
Submits the render job to Shotstack. Returns immediately with a render ID.

SETUP:
  SHOTSTACK_API_KEY — shotstack.io → Dashboard → API Keys → copy Production key

Pricing:
  Sandbox (free, watermarked): change URL to https://api.shotstack.io/stage/render
  Production (pay-as-you-go):  $0.09/render → 20 videos/month = $1.80/month

Start on sandbox, flip to /v1/ when happy with output.

nodes.name: Code: Store Render ID
nodes.notes: Extracts render_id from Shotstack's response and carries post metadata forward to the poll nodes.

nodes.name: Wait: 90s (Render in Progress)
nodes.notes:
A 1080×1920 MP4 at 75s typically renders in 60-120s on Shotstack.
90s is a good first check. If not done, the flow retries after another 45s.

nodes.name: Shotstack: Poll Render Status (1)
nodes.notes:
Polls render status. Shotstack statuses:
  'queued'    — waiting in queue
  'fetching'  — downloading assets
  'rendering' — encoding in progress
  'saving'    — uploading to CDN
  'done'      — complete, response.data.url has the video URL
  'failed'    — check response.data.error for details

nodes.name: Render Done? (1st Check)
nodes.notes:
True  → render finished → extract video URL
False → wait 45s more and poll again

nodes.name: Wait: 45s More (Still Rendering)
nodes.notes: Second wait if render wasn't done after 90s. Covers slower renders up to ~135s total.

nodes.name: Shotstack: Poll Render Status (2)
nodes.notes: Final poll. If status is still not 'done', check shotstack.io → Dashboard → Renders for the error message.

nodes.name: Merge: Render Status Paths
nodes.notes: Merges the 'done on first check' and 'done on second check' paths into one stream.

nodes.name: Code: Extract Final Video URL
nodes.notes:
Extracts the Shotstack CDN video URL from response.url.
This URL is permanent — Shotstack hosts renders on their CDN indefinitely.

nodes.name: Supabase: Save Video URLs to content_queue
nodes.notes:
Writes the final video URL back to content_queue:
  youtube_video_url  — picked up by Flow 02's YouTube upload node
  instagram_reel_url — same video, used for Instagram Reel
  status             → 'video_ready'

After this runs, re-POST to Flow 02's /approve-post webhook with the same post_id
to trigger YouTube Shorts + Instagram Reels publishing automatically.

nodes.name: Resend: Notify Video Ready
nodes.notes:
Emails a preview link to the generated video.
Next step: watch it → re-approve in dashboard → Flow 02 publishes to YouTube + Instagram.

main.node: Supabase: Save Video URLs to content_queue

new_env_vars_required.ELEVENLABS_VOICE_ID: elevenlabs.io → Voice Library → pick voice → copy ID. Recommended: EXAVITQu4vr4xnSDxMaL (Bella) or VR6AewLTigWG4xSOukaG (Arnold)
new_env_vars_required.OPENAI_API_KEY: platform.openai.com → API Keys. Needs DALL-E 3 access. Cost: $0.04/image × 5 = $0.20/video
new_env_vars_required.SHOTSTACK_API_KEY: shotstack.io → Dashboard → API Keys → copy Production key. Sandbox key available for free watermarked testing.

shotstack_sandbox_vs_production.tip: Start with sandbox URL in the Shotstack: Start Render node. Swap to /v1/ when you're happy with the video.

supabase_storage_setup: Supabase Dashboard → Storage → New Bucket → Name: 'content-audio' → toggle PUBLIC ON
Shotstack needs to download the audio file, so the bucket must be publicly readable
__setup_notes.content_queue_migration: ALTER TABLE content_queue ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS instagram_reel_url text, ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS video_generated_at timestamptz, ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS video_audio_url text, ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS video_image_urls jsonb, ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS video_render_id text;

how_to_trigger.manual: n8n → Test webhook → POST { post_id: '<uuid from content_queue>' }
how_to_trigger.from_flow_02: Add an HTTP Request node at the end of Flow 02's approve path that POSTs to this webhook

__setup_notes.total_time_per_video: ~4-6 minutes total (ElevenLabs ~5s + 5× DALL-E 3 ~8s each + Shotstack render ~90-135s)
